subject: fix(theme): replace remaining hardcoded colors with theme tokens
body:
Audit found 6 files with hardcoded hex/rgba colors that should use
theme-aware values from useTheme().colors.

ChatListItem.tsx:
- Convert module-level StyleSheet.create (locked to THEME_HEX.luxury)
  to createCardStyles(colors) function pattern
- Replace hardcoded rgba(212, 115, 108, ...) with withAlpha(colors.error, ...)

home.tsx:
- Replace #FFFFFF on Update button with colors.successContent
  (text on success-colored background)

ToneSelector.tsx:
- Replace #FFFFFF "Add" button text with colors.primaryContent
- Replace #FFFFFF selected tone border/text with colors.base100
- Add useTheme() to ToneButton inner component

MessageInfoModal.tsx:
- Replace #FFFFFF tone label text with colors.neutralContent
  (light in all themes, contrasts with saturated tone backgrounds)
- Add useTheme() import and hook call

Tags: theme, cleanup, code-quality
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
